ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "epoc_ms" TEXT /* Epoch time in milliseconds when the record was created */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp in ISO format indicating when data was captured */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds since the start of data collection */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* Motion data in degrees per second on the x-axis */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Motion data in degrees per second on the y-axis */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Motion data in degrees per second on the z-axis */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that collected this data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device where the sensor is installed */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the sensor is mounted */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data record */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the integrity check was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the record is valid or not */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the record is invalid */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of integrity check (e.g., timestamp validation, data range) */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Detailed result of the check (e.g., passed, failed, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data record */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis (e.g., average speed) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis findings */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis (e.g., window size, threshold) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert, including details of the condition */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., new, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor this configuration belongs to */,
  "sample_rate" REAL /* Sample rate in Hz for data collection */,
  "threshold_x" REAL /* Threshold for x-axis motion */,
  "threshold_y" REAL /* Threshold for y-axis motion */,
  "threshold_z" REAL /* Threshold for z-axis motion */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data to be collected (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the exported data is stored */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
